chapters.title: Welcome to Dart ✨
chapters.description: Start your journey in Dart by learning the basics of printing and data.

chapters.title: Variables & Data 🧮
chapters.description: Store and manipulate data with variables, numbers, strings, and booleans.

chapters.title: Control Flow 🚦
chapters.description: Make your programs smart using if/else statements and switch cases.

chapters.title: Loops & Iteration 🔁
chapters.description: Repeat actions effortlessly using for and while loops.

chapters.title: Functions 🛠️
chapters.description: Organize your code into reusable blocks called functions.

chapters.title: Lists & Maps 📦
chapters.description: Group data logically using Collections like Lists and Maps.

chapters.title: Object-Oriented Dart 🏗️
chapters.description: Model the real world with Classes and Objects in Dart.

chapters.title: Advanced Dart 🛡️
chapters.description: Master Null Safety, Asynchronous programming, and advanced topics.
